title: Eversource Energy (ES) Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates
text: Eversource Energy (ES) came out with quarterly earnings of $1 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.92 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.86 per share a year ago.

title: Eversource Energy beats Q2 profit estimates on lower costs
text: Utility firm Eversource Energy beat Wall Street estimates for second-quarter profit on Monday, helped by lower costs and a favorable regulatory decision.

title: Eversource Energy Reports Second Quarter Results
text: HARTFORD, Conn. & BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Eversource earned $15.4 million in second quarter, including a charge related to offshore wind investments and Eversource Gas transition costs.

title: Eversource Energy (ES) to Post Q2 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: Eversource Energy's (ES) second-quarter 2023 results are expected to benefit from increased investments, though higher interest expense might negatively impact the same.

title: Eversource Energy (ES) Reports Next Week: Wall Street Expects Earnings Growth
text: Eversource (ES) possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: Facing the hounds of hell, Spanish voters head for a divisive election
text: MADRID (MarketWatch) — Millions of Spaniards are set to cast their ballots in a rare summer election that promises heated politics as they also battle a three-headed hound from hell.

title: Eversource Energy to Discuss Second Quarter Results
text: HARTFORD, Conn. & BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Eversource will webcast a call with analysts on Aug. 1, 2023, at 9 a.m. ET, to discuss financial performance through the second quarter of 2023.

title: Eversource Energy: A Solid Utility Selling At An Attractive Valuation
text: Eversource Energy is one of the largest utilities in the United States, serving a sizable portion of the highly-populated New England region. The company enjoys remarkably stable cash flows, which is something that could prove advantageous as the consumer and economy weaken. The company is positioned to deliver a 9% to 11% total average annual return over the next five years.
